message:
fix(dlfcn): dlclose returns 0 on double-close in hardened mode (bd-85mm)

In hardened mode, dlclose now returns 0 (success) on double-close instead
of -1 (error). This implements the "repair" behavior for undefined dlclose
patterns.

Changes:
- Add conformance-testing feature to frankenlibc-abi for test mode control
- Add hardened mode check to all dlclose code paths (bootstrap + normal)
- Export conformance_testing module with set_hardened_mode() for tests
- Update conformance test to use set_hardened_mode() guard

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@ unsafe_code = "allow"
 [features]
 default = []
 standalone = []
+conformance-testing = []
 
 [dependencies]
 frankenlibc-membrane = { workspace = true }
